title: Dogfood: doctor --lint + doctor --apply-lint on Fabric self-repo; install fabric-import; capture evidence
scope: scripts/dogfood-rc4-doctor.mjs (NEW); .workflow/.lite-plan/fabric-v2-rc4-impl-2026-05-10/dogfood-evidence.md (NEW); on-disk artifacts in .fabric/ (events.jsonl + agents.meta.json updates from --apply-lint run)
description: Self-repo dogfood validating rc.4 deliverables end-to-end. (1) Author scripts/dogfood-rc4-doctor.mjs (mirrors rc2/rc3 dogfood scripts) that runs `runDoctor(projectRoot, {mode:'lint'})` (read-only) then `runDoctor(projectRoot, {mode:'lint', applyLint:true})` against Fabric self-repo .fabric/ tree; captures findings, mutations, and emitted events. (2) Run fabric init in a tmpdir copy of Fabric self-repo to verify fabric-import skill installs cleanly to .claude/skills/ + .codex/skills/. (3) Document evidence in dogfood-evidence.md with: events.jsonl tail showing knowledge_demoted + knowledge_archived events from --apply-lint, before/after agents.meta.json counter snapshots, doctor --lint report output, install path verification screenshots/dumps.

files.change: Mirror scripts/dogfood-rc3-review.mjs structure: import { runDoctor } from '@fenglimg/fabric-server' (or build dist + dynamic import); resolve projectRoot to current working dir; phase 1: runDoctor({mode:'lint'}) — capture findings array, group by kind, log to stdout; phase 2: runDoctor({mode:'lint', applyLint:true}) — capture mutated paths + new events emitted; phase 3: read events.jsonl tail (last 50 lines), filter for knowledge_demoted + knowledge_archived events from this run (timestamp filter), log to stdout; phase 4: read agents.meta.json before/after (capture before BEFORE phase 2, after AFTER phase 2), diff and log; phase 5: install verification — spawn `node packages/cli/dist/index.js init --reinstall-skills` in a tmpdir copy of Fabric self-repo (mkdtemp + cp -r .fabric + cp -r packages/cli/dist + cp package.json + cp pnpm-lock.yaml or skip), assert .claude/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md exists; phase 6: emit JSON report to stdout containing all findings + mutations + events + install verification results.

Sections: (1) Date + commit context (HEAD sha, branch); (2) Phase 1 findings — bulleted list of all lint:* findings from initial doctor --lint run, grouped by kind; explain each; if 0 findings (likely on fresh self-repo), note that AND seed a deliberate fixture entry (e.g., copy a stable-maturity entry, manually backdate its frontmatter created_at to 100d ago, append fake old plan_context_fetch event) to demonstrate full pipeline; (3) Phase 2 mutations — list of file mutations applied (orphan-demote: file X maturity changed from stable to endorsed; stale-archive: file Y moved to .fabric/.archive/<type>/; index-drift: agents.meta.json counter <layer>/<type> updated from N to M); (4) Phase 3 events — events.jsonl tail showing knowledge_demoted + knowledge_archived events (verbatim JSON lines), one per line, asserting event_type + stable_id + reason fields populated; (5) Phase 4 meta-state — agents.meta.json before/after diff (likely 1 counter advance if index-drift happened); (6) Phase 5 install verification — output of fabric init in tmpdir; assert all 3 skills installed; (7) Phase 6 fabric-import skill smoke test — verify .claude/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md content matches template; (8) Acceptance check matrix — 12 handoff acceptance criteria + 1 orchestrator-added coverage gate; PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL per criterion with rationale; (9) Conclusion: 'rc.4 dogfood passes' or specific issues blocking gate.

implementation: Read scripts/dogfood-rc3-review.mjs to lock the script structure (imports, projectRoot resolution, phase orchestration, evidence emission)
Author scripts/dogfood-rc4-doctor.mjs mirroring rc3 shape; replace rc3 review-flow phases with rc.4 doctor lint+apply-lint phases; add install verification phase

Run scripts/dogfood-rc4-doctor.mjs on Fabric self-repo; capture stdout (the JSON report) into dogfood-evidence.md sections; if Phase 1 yields 0 findings (likely on fresh self-repo), seed deliberate fixture and note 'fixture seeded for demonstration' in dogfood-evidence

If 0 findings from raw self-repo (no genuine 90d-old stable entries), seed: (a) take 1 rc.2 dogfood entry already on disk at .fabric/knowledge/pending/decisions/, manually move to .fabric/knowledge/team/decisions/ with maturity=stable + frontmatter.created_at backdated to 100d ago + no plan_context_fetch events for that id (or backdate a fake event); (b) ensure events.jsonl tail does NOT have a recent activity event for that stable_id; (c) re-run dogfood script — expect 1 lint:orphan_demote finding

Capture phase outputs: doctor --lint findings (Phase 1), apply-lint mutations + emitted events (Phase 2-3), agents.meta.json before/after (Phase 4), install verification (Phase 5), skill smoke test (Phase 6)
Author dogfood-evidence.md with all 9 sections; use verbatim JSON quotes for events; concrete file paths + counters for mutations; explicit PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL for each acceptance criterion

After dogfood evidence captured, REVERT seed mutations on self-repo (restore agents.meta.json, restore files moved to .archive/) — self-repo state should be clean post-dogfood; alternatively, COMMIT the dogfood mutations as part of rc.4 (matches rc.2/rc.3 precedent of committing dogfood artifacts)
Decision: COMMIT dogfood mutations as evidence on disk (rc.2 + rc.3 precedent); the demoted/archived state IS the audit trail; do NOT revert; events.jsonl entries are forensic record
Commit as 'chore(dogfood): rc.4 doctor --lint + --apply-lint + fabric-import install verification (rc.4 TASK-009)'

reference.pattern: rc.2 scripts/dogfood-rc2-archive.mjs + rc.3 scripts/dogfood-rc3-review.mjs script pattern; rc.2 + rc.3 dogfood-evidence.md document pattern
reference.examples: rc.3 dogfood-rc3-review.mjs (170 LOC including 4 review actions + filesystem fallback synth); rc.3 dogfood-evidence.md (274 lines)

criteria: scripts/dogfood-rc4-doctor.mjs exists and is executable (`node scripts/dogfood-rc4-doctor.mjs` exits 0)
Script invokes runDoctor with mode:'lint' (Phase 1) and mode:'lint',applyLint:true (Phase 2)
Phase 1 captures findings (or seeds fixture if 0 findings) — verified by stdout output
Phase 2 produces mutations on disk OR explicitly logs '0 mutations applied' if Phase 1 had 0 findings
Phase 3 reads events.jsonl tail and surfaces knowledge_demoted + knowledge_archived events for the run (or 0 if no mutations)
Phase 5 install verification runs fabric init in tmpdir and asserts fabric-import/SKILL.md present in both .claude/skills/ + .codex/skills/
dogfood-evidence.md acceptance-check matrix covers 12 handoff acceptance criteria + 1 orchestrator-added coverage gate (13 rows)
dogfood-evidence.md conclusion: 'rc.4 dogfood passes' OR specific blocking issue identified
If 0 raw findings: fixture seed approach documented + executed; resulting demoted/archived events still demonstrate pipeline correctness
On-disk state: events.jsonl has new entries from this run; agents.meta.json may have counter advance from index-drift fix; .fabric/.archive/ may have stale entries

rationale.chosen_approach: End-to-end script invocation matching rc.2/rc.3 precedent; commit dogfood artifacts (events + state mutations) as evidence; mirrors rc.2 + rc.3 'dogfood = real run with real artifacts' philosophy
alternatives_considered: Pure unit-test based verification (no real .fabric/ mutation) — rejected: rc.2/rc.3 precedent is real-state dogfood; mutation evidence is more compelling than mock-based assertion
Synthetic tmpdir-only dogfood (do not touch self-repo .fabric/) — rejected: self-repo IS the dogfood corpus; rc.2 + rc.3 entries on disk make this a natural integration target
Skip install verification phase — rejected: TASK-005 install must be exercised end-to-end at least once before v2.0.0 ships
Defer fixture seeding to after rc.4 ships — rejected: dogfood evidence should include genuine pipeline trace, not trivially-empty findings list
decision_factors: Rc.2 + rc.3 set precedent of committing dogfood mutations
Self-repo is the natural rc.4 corpus (3 rc.2 dogfood entries + rc.3 review trail already exist)
Real events in events.jsonl are stronger evidence than synthetic mocks
Install verification phase ensures TASK-005 dist-path resolution works in prod
rationale.tradeoffs: Self-repo dogfood mutates state → slight git noise for next dogfood; mitigated by clean evidence trail in dogfood-evidence.md and events.jsonl

manual_checks: Run scripts/dogfood-rc4-doctor.mjs locally — verify exit 0, stdout matches expected JSON report shape
Read dogfood-evidence.md top-to-bottom — verify each section has concrete content (not placeholder)
Verify acceptance-check matrix: 13 rows, each with PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL + rationale + evidence pointer
Verify on disk: events.jsonl has new lines, agents.meta.json may have updated counters
success_metrics: dogfood-evidence.md contains all 9 sections + 13-row acceptance matrix
All 12 handoff acceptance criteria marked PASS or PARTIAL with explicit rationale; 0 marked FAIL

risks.description: Self-repo .fabric/ has 0 lint findings (no aged entries), making dogfood trivially empty
risks.mitigation: Fixture-seed approach documented explicitly: copy or backdate a fixture entry to trigger orphan-demote check; document the seeding step transparently in dogfood-evidence.md; pipeline correctness still demonstrated
risks.fallback: If even seeded fixture proves brittle, demonstrate via integration test (already shipped in TASK-001/002/003) and note empty self-repo dogfood as expected

risks.description: Install verification in tmpdir may fail due to dist-path resolution issues
risks.mitigation: Test TASK-005 install thoroughly via integration tests first (already part of TASK-005); dogfood is final cross-check; if it fails, root cause is TASK-005 path resolution and must be fixed before TASK-010 gate
risks.fallback: Skip tmpdir install verification, run install directly in self-repo (already happens via TASK-005 build); document as 'tmpdir verification skipped — same-repo install verified via TASK-005 tests'

risks.description: Committing dogfood mutations to self-repo creates git noise that conflicts with rc.4 final tag
risks.mitigation: Dogfood commit is one of the 10 atomic rc.4 commits (TASK-009); fits naturally before TASK-010 final gate; v2.0.0 tag (TASK-010) annotates the resulting state
risks.fallback: Squash dogfood commit into TASK-010 if reviewers prefer single-commit final state

key_functions.purpose: 6-phase orchestration: lint → apply-lint → events → meta diff → install verify → smoke test
